transcript.text:
Hello everyone
I prepared Jjapaghetti and Mandu today
How many are in here? (dumplings)
I think around 10
So a total of 40 mandus and 7 packs jjapaghetti
Oh these are circular(?)
Meat and perilla leaf mandu
1, 2, 3,
[Grill full of mandu]
It fits
Looks delicious
Done!
[Mandu tower]
[This is Tzuyang's noodle pot]
[This is Tzuyang's plate]
[Fried egg with jjapaghetti is a must]

It's all done now
Bon appetit
Refreshing
Looks good
With green onion kimchi
That's so good
Mandu this time
That's nicely cooked
Didn't I do a good job?
This is pulmuone's new item Thin layer mandu
Let's try the meat one first
Kimchi one too
The thin layer mandus is good pan-fried too!
Really delicious
It's still steaming
Green onion kimchi is good too

With mandu
These dumplings don't taste like they're made in factories
The layer is thin and it's filled with meat I can barely taste any flour
Kimchi mandu
Really doesn't feel like frozen food
It tastes better than restaurant dumplings
Like actual dumpling restaurants
Let's put it on top
It's completely filled, right?
You can taste a lot of meat
Kimchi
Filled
Tasty
The kimchi tastes homemade
Taste of perilla leaf
Was it meat & perilla leaf?

It's been a while since I had Jjapaghetti
Like over a month
[With some green onion kimchi]
I think it tastes better when it's fried well-done
How many dumplings do normal people eat?
[40 is not enough]
Jjapaghetti is already almost gone
[Recovery process]
Just like new
This combination is really nice
Jingu~
He answered
A lot of people are asking why Jingu is never interested in the food I'm eating
I guess I'm lucky because he doesn't like human food
And I think he likes the camera
Always runs towards the camera

Even when I take a selfie from my phone
He runs towards it
I think the layer be very chewy when steamed
It's very well made
I got you
Can you see the squishy pink jelly?
Such a cutie when he sleeps
I think I've received the most birthday gifts this year
Well, I don't have that many friends
The egg yolk..
It's so good with the yolk
That was such a nice meal
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
